sections.name: Dashboard
sections.description: Stats grid (6-column), bar chart for idea volume, doughnut for categories, activity table

sections.name: Projects
sections.description: Filterable data table with progress bars, status badges, project metadata

sections.name: Workspace
sections.description: Split-panel editor with rich text toolbar, properties sidebar, activity feed

sections.name: Kanban
sections.description: 5-column drag-and-drop board (Backlog, To Do, In Progress, Review, Done)

sections.name: Whiteboard
sections.description: SVG canvas with tool palette, grid background, pre-placed architecture diagram

sections.name: Schema Planner
sections.description: 6-entity ER diagram grid with PK/FK indicators and data types

sections.name: Directory Tree
sections.description: Collapsible file tree with file type icons, sizes, and indentation

sections.name: Ideas
sections.description: 3-column card grid with priority indicators, votes, tags, descriptions

sections.name: AI Chat
sections.description: Message feed with user/AI avatars, inline data table, input area

sections.name: Settings
sections.description: Tabbed panel (General, Appearance, Notifications, Integrations, Team, Billing)

subagentFlags.accentUsage: surgical-red — active states, priority indicators, schema highlights only
subagentFlags.sidebarDesign: black-panel-220px with red left-border active indicator
